caption: 🔒 Your Contet Creation account can be hacked in ju...
full_caption:
🔒 Your Contet Creation account can be hacked in just ONE click.
Weak passwords and unknown links are the biggest reasons people lose their WhatsApp, Instagram, photos, chats, and even money. 😟

📩 If you receive a suspicious link — DON’T open it. DON’T share your OTP.
One mistake is enough for hackers to take full control.

If you clicked the link or shared your OTP 👉 Act immediately:
1️⃣ Block your SIM
2️⃣ Freeze your bank account
3️⃣ Recover your WhatsApp / Instagram
4️⃣ Enable Two-Step Verification
5️⃣ Use an Authenticator App
6️⃣ Keep backup codes safe
7️⃣ File a complaint on the Cyber Crime Portal (24/7)
📞 Helpline: 1930
🔗 cybercrime.gov.in

⚠️ Protect your digital identity before it’s too late.
Follow NICOLA FOUNDATION for more awareness content. 🌿

#cybersafety #cybercrimeawareness #onlinefraud #instagramsafety #whatsappsecurity #otpwarning #socialmediasecurity #passwordprotection #twostepverification #cybercrimeindia #protectyouridentity #digitalawareness #fraudalert #nicolafoundation
